'''Jahnar-Kooda''' was a male [[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] in the service of [[Boss Banjeer]] as of [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]. He and other hunters were hired to keep the local Baramorrans in line. When local elders objected, Banjeer killed them.

{{Char-stub}}
